message:
fix(ufunc): reject out-of-bounds as_strided views instead of zero-filling

as_strided now returns an error when any computed offset exceeds the
source data bounds, instead of silently substituting 0.0. This makes
invalid stride configurations a hard error rather than a silent data
corruption risk. Overflow on intermediate offset arithmetic is also
now surfaced as an error instead of falling through to zero-fill.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
